response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in customer-facing technical discovery — key requirements for a Staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with agentic workflows and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong full-stack proficiency in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Active open-source contributor with demonstrable engineering craftsmanship and teaching ability
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in work history
AI experience appears incidental rather than core; insufficient evidence of 8+ years in production AI systems
Limited documentation of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI deployment
